feed.title: SAP Community - SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central
feed.subtitle: SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Business email creation in AD to SuccessFactors
entry.content:
Hi AD and SF Experts,

I recently worked on a project aimed at generating business email addresses and usernames in Active Directory, with the intention of sending this information back to SuccessFactors.

However, we discovered that while generating usernames was possible, creating business email addresses was not. We could only update existing business email addresses from AD to SF. From what I’ve read, it seems that AD-SF integration does not support the creation of email addresses.

So, I’m curious—what do your customers typically do in this situation? It seems like automatically generating business email addresses is a common practice. HR shouldn’t have to manually enter this information during the hiring process.

Best regards,
Ines

entry.title: Different Configuration in QA and production system in Employee Central
entry.content:
Hello Team,

Different Configuration found in QA and production system in Employee Central Instance, 

how to rectify or sync so that both systems have same configuration 

Thank you!

entry.title: Temporary Time Information for China new hires
entry.content:
Hi

Is anyone else using Temporary Time Information for China to deal with weekends becoming working days.

We use this feature but our HR team would like to know if there is a way of automating this for new hires as currently they create the temporary time information for each new hire in China.

Keen to know how others are handling this process.

Thanks!

Chris

entry.title: Need a Report with Names of all employees who selected Box #4 on the I-9 form
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We have a legal  requirement that needs a report that includes the names of all employees who selected Box #4 on the I-9 called Non-Citizen Authorized to work until [Date]. They also need this report to include the date input. They would like this data exported from both ONB1.0 and 2.0 .  Is this feasible ? I have gone through the ONB 2.0 Implementation guide 1H/2024 release , Section 8.20  but I couldn't find any Box # related fields. Please confirm. If not possible any workaround ?

I spoke with SAP Support team, but as per them it is not possible to have it in Story Report as on today.

Regards,

Niladri

 SAP SuccessFactors Onboarding SAP SuccessFactors People Analytics SAP Analytics Cloud

entry.title: Sync Employee Central Termination Date to S/4 HANA Cloud
entry.content:
We are currently replicating data from SuccessFactors Employee Central via an integration in SAP Integration Suite called "SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Integration with SAP S/4HANA Cloud: Employee Data".

Is there a way we can replicate the termination date or Company Exit date from Employee Central to S/4 HANA Cloud and apply it to the Business User's validity?

That way whenever an employee is terminated from SuccessFactors, once the sync runs it will update the business user's validity on S/4 Hana Cloud and it will get deactivated.

entry.title: Hello,how to create a field to disability and degree of disability in Global Info
entry.content:
Hello , for my client i have to create a field  to disability and degree of disability in Global Info,create this field in Core and ONB? what is the action i shoud take can anyone help me

Thank you

entry.title: rule to delete attachment
entry.content: It is possible to delete attachment after 1 month?

entry.title: How To hide the "Work Permit" portlet in both Employee Central (EC)for USA Employes
entry.content:
Hello, 

Can anybody  help me To find how to hide the "Work Permit" portlet in  Employee Central (EC) for USA employee only please

entry.title: Ensuring Auto-Submission of Timesheets Without Overtime Hours in Positive Time Recording
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I'm working with positive time recording where auto-approval is enabled by default. I want to modify this so that if an employee does not work overtime hours, their timesheet is automatically submitted. However, if overtime hours are recorded, the timesheet should require manager approval. I’ve identified a basic business rule that seems relevant, but I’m looking for advice on whether there are other methods or solutions available to address this issue. Any insights or suggestions would be greatly appreciated.

 

 

 

Thank you!

entry.title: How to grant access for a specific period of time
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

in SuccessFactors RBP, we are looking for a solution to add the user to a specific Permission Group for a certain period of time like 24 hrs/2 days, after elapsing the time the user must be auto removed from that group.

Any suggestion would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks

entry.title: Which Joule functions will be available for Customers who don't have Employee Central module?
entry.content: Which Joule functions will be available for Customers who don't have Employee Central module? I couldn't find any clear functionality list matched with modules in use. Can somebody help?

entry.title: Guidance Needed: Replicating Employee Data from Workday to SuccessFactors Employee Central Using SA
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am new to SuccessFactors integration and need some guidance on a project where we must integrate employee data into SuccessFactors Employee Central (EC). Specifically, we need to handle files (Terminations.csv, NewHires.csv, and Changes.csv) from the source system and upsert this data into SuccessFactors EC. The processing must occur in sequence to ensure data integrity, and we need to skip processing of files if the data already exists in SuccessFactors EC.

Given that Workday is not within our project scope, our focus is on using SAP Cloud Platform Integration (CPI) for file conversion and data handling.

If anyone has experience with replicating employee master data from Workday to SuccessFactors EC using SAP CPI, I would greatly appreciate your insights on the following:

  1. iFlow Implementation:

    • How to design and configure iFlows to process files (Terminations.csv, NewHires.csv, Changes.csv) in the correct sequence.
    • Best practices for setting up and configuring file adapters, content modifiers, and SuccessFactors EC adapters.

  2. Data Transformation and Upsertion:

    • Detailed steps for transforming and mapping data from the source files to the SuccessFactors EC format.
    • How to handle upserting new hires, applying changes, and processing terminations, including how to skip files if the data already exists.

  3. Error Handling and Monitoring:

    • Recommended strategies for managing errors and exceptions during file processing.
    • Tips for effective monitoring and ensuring successful execution of the integration flows.

Your detailed guidance and examples of handling similar scenarios with SuccessFactors EC inbound integrations would be extremely valuable.

entry.title: System functionality for the employees on secondment
entry.content:
Hello,

I have received a request from a client asking if there is a native functionality allowing for the home country HR to control and manage the home and host record of an employee who is sent for the secondment. Host country HR should not be able to access the record of a person on the secondment.

I know this is possible to be set with RBPs, but the client insists on having the SAP response if there is native functionality supporting this behavior.

Does SuccessFactors has a native functionality which meets the above described requirement?

Regards,

Piotr Retecki

entry.title: Employment end date notification - old alert
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

We have some concerns regarding the notifications for employment end dates in cases of contract renewal and transformation from limited to unlimited.

Currently, we set the effective date as the day after the first contract expiration date. For example, if the employment end date is 31/12/2024, the effective date for both renewal and transformation time slice is 01/01/2025.

However, we face a problem when trying to delete the old pending alerts. If we perform the action today, 12/09/2024, the delete old pending alert fails because the effective date of the change is 01/01/2025 and there are pending alerts not deleted.

Furthermore, when transforming a limited contract to an unlimited one, SAP suggests using 9999-12-31 as the end date. However, same here the effective date needs to be earlier than the trigger date of the old pending alert.

To illustrate, let's consider the previous example. By adding a time slice with the effective date set to 12/09/2024 and using either 2999 (for limited to unlimited) or the new date, the old pending alerts are deleted. However, by doing so and adding time slice as a data change only to adjust the data and prevent old pending alert to be send out, the employment end date is no longer reportable. (we can still can the time slice either review or limited – unlimited on the effective date 01/01/2025)

If anyone has encountered this issue or knows of any best practices to handle it, your insights would be greatly appreciated.

Thank

Giorgio

Below the KBA already consulted 

3071514 - Delete Old Pending Alert Flag - Same Effective Date - SAP for Me

How Old Pending Alerts Are Handled | SAP Help Portal

entry.title: Compare a Date value with Today's date and output a text value in success factors
entry.content:
Hi all,

Probably a very simple question (I've literally had 4 hours experience in success factors reporting - don't ask)

I need to create a calculated column to compare a Date value with Today's date and output text values.
If Date < Today Then "Past Date"  Else "Current or Future Date"

Really basic stuff yet I can't suss it out  😞

I have to say even BOBJ Reporter back in 2000 was a million times better than SF reporting - it really is dire.

entry.title: Visibility work seniority result
entry.content:
In the last release (1H 2024) SAP released new functionality to calculate employee work seniority based on MDF objects (https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_SUCCESSFACTORS_RELEASE_INFORMATION/8e0d540f96474717bbf18df51e54e522/3d58995c3ad540d5b18d24f112a7c577.html?parentHref=/whats-new/8fcf4960eea24f78b1d7613da406a885?Version=1H%202024&q=seniority&locale=en-US&parentName=SAP%20SuccessFactors%20What's%20New&locale=en-US).

This is great functionality to calculate the seniority; but it seems that there is no UI available to make the results visible to employees/managers on the people profile (no element to add and it does not seem possible to create a custom UI for the MDF object). Are we missing something? In the implementation guide I also don't see anything around visibility of the result (https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_SUCCESSFACTORS_EMPLOYEE_CENTRAL/c18eb6c8febd4d7c924db8a257ce940d/37d55f65235c4f6690241f45f68055bb.html?q=seniority&locale=en-US).

entry.title: Job History view for previously in target Employees
entry.content:
Hi,

We are looking for an approach to cover the following scenario:

  • Employee A has been hired from 2020 to 2023 in a US legal entity
  • from 1.1.2023 the employee has been moved to Italy (terminated in US and re-hired in Italy)

HRs have a RBP with a target on specific legal entity and the HR in US, from 1.1.2023 cannot view anymore the information related to the employee who has been moved.

When navigating to the profile, he has not an HR view on his data, neither changing the effective as of date of visualization and, moreover, when HR makes reports with effective date e.g. in 2021 the employee does not appear for US HR because he is not in the target anymore.

Any suggestion on how to fix the situation?

entry.title: Is standard field Employee Profile "country" syncronized with the "Country/Region" in Job Info?
entry.content:
Dear Community,

we would like to know if the standard "country" field in Manage Business Configuration --> Employee Profile --> Standard --> country is connected through standard sync with the "Country/Region" field in Job Information. 

Thank you in advance for your time.

entry.title: Where i can see Hr org replication at S4Hana public cloud?
entry.content: Where i can see org replication while replicating Employee from sap success factors EC to S4Hana public cloud. Employee replicated as worker but can’t see the assigned org ( position, department, division and so on )

entry.title: How to hide the confirmation page on mobile browser
entry.content:
Hello everyone,I'm a beginner in sf.
I would like to ask a question here.

My customer wants to use it from a mobile browser.
Therefore, when you click on the workflow summary, the following screen will be displayed.
Since I am not using sap mobile app,
I would like to launch the mobile browser directly without displaying this screen.
Has anyone else experience this? Thank you!

 

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Close

Cause 

This is expected behavior and cannot be disabled.
